title: 大阪杯の後に・整わない呼吸

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I reached my limit... The race is over... but I'm still
out of breath...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I gotta say, though, the way Taishin was running out there was wild!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that intensity! It makes you want to root
for her even more!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I won, but that really did me in... I'm kinda
surprised I got first...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah... but Taishin's energy today was, like, wow... It was really, really intense...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It makes me wanna work harder!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you pick my next race yet? I wanna run a
big one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Winning Ticket is exhausted, there's no
denying she got a great result in today's race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So for our next challenge, I think we should aim
for the big race that tops off the first half of the
Twinkle Series year...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! A Grand Prix race! I bet a lot of BIG
competitors will show up there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What if Taishin and Hayahide enter too, and it
becomes a super hot match like the Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All the cheers! All the smiles! Just thinking about it makes me wanna... cryyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna go full blast for the
Takarazuka Kinen!
